name: FluoGuide A/S
summary: FluoGuide A/S, a life science company, engages in the development and sale of surgical solutions in Denmark. It develops FG001, which is in phase I/II for the treatment of high-grade glioma; and FG002 that allows surgeons to differentiate cancer from normal tissue during surgery through a novel urokinase-type plasminogen activator receptor targeted luminescent technology. The company was founded in 2018 and is based in Copenhagen, Denmark.
